pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run on JDK 11 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 1.8, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API.
pom.xml.why_exists: In Spring Boot 3 (which requires Java 11+), the `jakarta.annotation` package is no longer provided by default in the same way as `javax.annotation` was in Java 8/9/10 environments, leading to compile errors if annotations like @PostConstruct are used without this dependency.
